{{Quote|There is no question that Master T'chooka was a fearless warrior. The Force was strong in him on Vandos; his skills were great, but not enough. Grievous made short work of him.|Flynn Kybo recalls his master's death|<ref name="gg1" />}}
'''T'chooka D'oon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] dispatched D'oon to the planet [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]] to put an end to the [[Huk War]]. D'oon favored the [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]], also known as the Huk, and supported them during his time on Kalee. The [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]], who fought against the Huk on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], began to hate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master, calling him "the Executioner of Kalee." In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], during the Clone Wars, D'oon, now a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]], was [[Rescue mission to Vandos|sent]] to the planet [[Vandos]]. Accompanied by his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Flynn Kybo]], and a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], D'oon was assigned to rescue [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Quiyyen]] from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces. The Confederate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], who was leading a group of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], attacked D'oon's group and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Jedi with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|My Jedi Master, T'chooka D'oon, stepped into the breach. Skilled and courageous, he acquainted himself well. In the end, it was but a forlorn hope.|Kybo, recalling D'oon's actions on Vandos|<ref name="gg1" />}}
[[File:TheDeathofTchookaDoon.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The death of T'chooka D'oon at the hands of Grievous.]]
T'chooka D'oon, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]],<ref name="gg1" /> was an [[Nubian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] dispatched D'oon to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalee/Legends|Kalee]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master had to peacefully bring an end to the [[Huk War|war]] that was fought between the [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]], also known as the Huk, and the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]]. D'oon supported the Huk, which angered the native Kaleesh, who nicknamed D'oon "the Executioner of Kalee."<ref name="cswe" /> During the Clone Wars, D'oon became a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]], and received a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], a Human male named [[Flynn Kybo]].<ref name="gg1" /> In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="nec" /> D'oon and Kybo were sent to the planet [[Vandos]]. During the [[Rescue mission to Vandos|mission]], D'oon and Kybo—accompanied by a group of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]—were tasked with rescuing [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Quiyyen]] from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces.<ref name="gg1" />

After landing their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] near a cliff, D'oon's group found Quiyyen, but were soon ambushed by [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. Leading the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] was the Confederate [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], who ordered the droids to leave no survivors. However, D'oon's group began to retreat back to their gunship. To give his team more time to enter the gunship, D'oon engaged Grievous in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]]. The [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] general overwhelmed the Jedi Master and sliced him in [[Sai tok/Legends|half]]. Kybo later told the Jedi Council of his Master's [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="gg1" /> The Padawan, however, wanted to avenge D'oon's death and began to search for Grievous. On the planet [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], Kybo [[Battle of Belsus|engaged]] Grievous in a lightsaber duel, although a nearby explosion killed Kybo.<ref name="gg4">[[General Grievous 4|''General Grievous'' 4]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
T'chooka D'oon's Padawan, Flynn Kybo, described D'oon as a skilled and courageous Jedi who often helped others. During the Vandos mission, D'oon wanted to give his group more time to retreat back to their gunship. He risked his life to save his group by engaging Grievous in a lightsaber duel, though the Jedi Master was unable to defeat him.<ref name="gg1" /> After the Jedi Council sent D'oon to Kalee to bring an end to the Huk War, D'oon sided with the Huk, which angered the native Kaleesh.<ref name="cswe" />

==Behind the scenes==
T'chooka D'oon first appeared in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]], [[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]], and was later mentioned in the [[General Grievous 4|fourth]] and final issue of the series. D'oon was later briefly mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' and in author [[Abel G. Peña]]'s story, ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]''. In [[2008]], D'oon received a short entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
